title: Incorrect HTTP method for HubSpot API subscription update
symptom: When attempting to update a subscription using the HubSpot API, the request fails with a 'Method not allowed' error.
applies_when: Using HubSpot API to update subscription
root_cause: The HubSpot API endpoint for updating communication preferences requires a POST method instead of PUT. This mismatch leads to the error when the incorrect method is used.
fix_steps: Change the HTTP method from PUT to POST in your API request
Ensure all other parameters are correctly set as per the API documentation
Test the request again to confirm it works
agent_instruction: Change the HTTP method to POST for the HubSpot subscription update request.
